judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with high expected future earnings, trading at a premium but with strong analyst backing.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 4.6%; next earnings date is 2026-05-05.
positives: Revenue growth 90.1% YoY — exceptional top-line expansion.
Analyst growth est, current FY 300.7% — significant future growth anticipated.
Operating margin 21.8% and Profit margin 17.7% — healthy profitability.
Return on equity 22.8% — efficient use of shareholder capital.
Consensus 'buy' rating from 24 analysts with a mean target price suggesting upside.
negatives: Trailing P/E 164.88 and Price/Sales 29.07 — valuation is very high.
Free cash flow $93.35M is low relative to market cap, suggesting growth is not yet fully cash-generative.
Beta 1.53 indicates higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Lumentum Holdings Inc. (LITE) is highlighted as one of America's greatest opportunities, with its stock experiencing an incredible run. This positive press suggests strong market sentiment and potential for continued upward momentum. Traders should note the upcoming earnings date, which could serve as a catalyst for further price discovery.

headlines.title: America's Greatest Opportunities: JDS Uniphase's Incredible Run

examples.body: $SNDK $MU $LITE next leg up dont you dare fizzle out leading into lunch
$LITE there she goes! Just following the chart! $1100 soon! $APH you need to follow. $NVDA
$LITE I was down 15,000 on my calls and now I’m up haha let’s goooo
